title: Steer service template
description: Logical structure of a Steer application template (service.template) and its sub-records. Templates are authored as Odoo XML; this schema describes the data a valid template must contain. The harness parses the XML into this shape and validates it. CONTRACT VERSIONING: 'x-schema-version' is the version of THIS contract (not the app's 'version' label). A template MAY declare which contract version it targets with an XML comment '<!-- steer-schema-version: 1.0 -->' (Odoo ignores comments, so it never affects install); the harness rejects a version it does not support. No marker = assumed current.

name.description: Display name shown in the catalog.

code.description: Unique, snake/kebab-case identifier. Must be unique across the whole catalog.

service_code.description: Groups interchangeable apps (cross-restore + 'change template'). Empty = only compatible with itself.

description.description: Short teaser shown on the catalog card.

rich_description.description: Optional rich HTML description (sanitized HTML allowed).

category.description: Classifies the app by what it does.

tags.description: Catalog tags (xmlids of agz_infra_suite.tag_*, without the module prefix).

is_web_app.description: Enables domain/SSL/Traefik. If true, at least one port must be traefik_routed.

database_is_external.description: DB is an external host (e.g. on-prem SQL Server), not a container in the stack.

backup_mode.description: 'standard' tars the data volumes; 'custom' uses backup_script/restore_script (required for databases).

health_check_command.description: Soft post-deploy check run inside the container (e.g. 'pg_isready -U $POSTGRES_USER').

use_cloudflare_tunnel.description: Expose via cloudflared instead of Traefik (servers with no public IP).

docker_compose_template.description: Jinja2 + YAML compose. Secrets are referenced as ${VAR_NAME}; per-instance values use variables.

backup_script.description: Bash. Dumps state into $BACKUP_DATA_DIR. Required when backup_mode=custom.

restore_script.description: Bash. Restores from $RESTORE_DATA_DIR and verifies the data is present.

traefik_routed.description: Route a Traefik subdomain to this port (the web port).

traefik_subdomain_suffix.description: Optional extra subdomain suffix for this port.

expose_to_host.description: If false, the port is internal (expose:) only.

name.description: Must match ${NAME} in the compose exactly.

is_secret.description: Secret value: rendered as ${NAME}, written only to the runtime .env.

selection_options.description: For var_type=selection: comma-separated or newline-separated options.

owner.description: UID:GID that must own the directory.

exclude_from_backup.description: Exclude from the file backup (set true on raw DB data dirs).

name.description: Descriptive name of the file (e.g. 'PostgreSQL Config').

filename.description: Name of the file to generate (e.g. 'postgresql.conf', '.env').

path.description: Relative path from the service directory (e.g. './', './config/'). Defaults to './'.

content_template.description: Jinja2-rendered config file content. Same variables as the compose.

skip_update.description: Do not overwrite on updates (first-deploy only).
